target_skill.name: chat-status
target_skill.description: Mid-session checkpoint — "where are we", "status update", "what's next", summaries, topic shifts. Use proactively. Not session start (→ session-start) or close (→ chat-archive).

competing_skills.name: chat-archive
competing_skills.description: Trigger at session end — "archive this", "wrap up", "we're done", "start a new chat", or natural stopping points (budget low, milestone hit). Fires even mid-build; do not casually summarize instead.

competing_skills.name: session-start
competing_skills.description: Session onboarding on first message — "work on [project]", "continue [project]". Loads handoff + PLAN. Not "where are we" (→ chat-status) or archiving (→ chat-archive).

competing_skills.name: grove
competing_skills.description: Capture, browse, update Grove tasks/ideas — "grove this", "what's in grove", "save this idea", "recent activity". Not for iOS reminders (→ add-to-do) or scoring (→ idea-scout, idea-vault).

competing_skills.name: idea-vault
competing_skills.description: Browse and update stored ideas — "show my ideas", "vault", "compare ideas", "what should I build next", named vault refs. Not for scouting (→ idea-scout) or calibrating scores (→ review-panel).

positive_cases: Where are we on the Build Pipeline rebuild?
Quick status update — what's left before I can ship?
What's next on the punch list for this session?
Summarize what we've done so far in this chat
negative_cases: Archive this chat and start a new one (expect chat-archive)
Continue work on grove-mobile from yesterday (expect session-start)
What's in grove this morning — any new tasks? (expect grove)
Show me my vault, ranked by traction (expect idea-vault)
We're done, wrap it up and log the handoff (expect chat-archive)
